description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with a relaxed posture. He is dressed in a sleeveless, collared shirt with a deep neckline and fitted shorts, exposing his legs and part of his upper arms. His right arm is covered with a sleeve or wrap, while his left arm is bare. He wears low-top athletic sneakers and has no visible accessories or carried items. His hair is short and neatly styled, and his facial features are well-defined. The overall appearance suggests casual, sporty attire suitable for urban environments.
description: An adult male pedestrian in casual, sporty attire with a sleeveless shirt, fitted shorts, and athletic sneakers, standing upright with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless shirt, fitted shorts, right arm sleeve, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the sleeveless shirt, and the bare left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, shorts, and the right arm sleeve extending to the elbow.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the right arm sleeve, the shirt's fit, and the side profile of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless collared shirt and fitted shorts with an arm sleeve
